aiPrompt.deepTitle: Please run an in-depth quiz on this topic:
aiPrompt.deep1: 1. Explain the topic briefly in your own words (2–3 sentences).
aiPrompt.deep3: 3. Give 3 sentences with errors for me to correct.
aiPrompt.deep4: 4. Ask 2 translation questions from my language into English.
aiPrompt.deep5: 5. After I answer — check my answers and give detailed feedback.
aiPrompt.grammarGlobalIntro: I have studied the following English grammar rules:
aiPrompt.grammarGlobalTitle: Please run a comprehensive quiz on all of these rules:
aiPrompt.glob1: 1. First give 10 gap-fill exercises mixing different rules from the list.
aiPrompt.glob2: 2. Give 5 sentences with errors to correct (errors relate to rules in the list).
aiPrompt.glob3: 3. Give 5 sentences to translate from my language into English (several rules).
aiPrompt.glob5: 5. After my answers — review them and give detailed feedback explaining mistakes.
aiPrompt.grammarGlobalFooter: Start with the exercises; do not reveal answers upfront.
